roa.docketEntryComment: PEOPLE'S NON-OPPO TO MOTION TO SET ASIDE PLEA OF GUILTY FILED
DEF NOTICE OF MOT AND MOT TO VACATE CONV PC 1473,7 FILED (WITH ORDER)

/X: AMENDED MINUTES 4-5-22/CAL: MOTION TO VACATE PURSUANT TO PC1473,7; DANON-OPP TO SET ASIDE/X: MOTION TO SET ASIDE PLEA AND CONVICTION AS TO THECHARGE OF 11359HS/X: THE CHARGE OF HS11359 WAS SEALED PURSUANT TO 11361,8PCON 03-18-19/X: IN EFFORT TO PROVIDE THE RELIEF SOUGHT THE CHARGE OF HS11359 IS TO BE UNSEALED AND THE COURT WILL PROCEED WITH VACTURE PROCEEDINGS, NO PROCEEDING TO SEAL THE CHARGE WILL BE PROCESSED AS DEFENSE HAS NOT REQUESTED TO SEAL THE CASE AFTER THE VACTURE PROCEEDINGS,/X: THE PEOPLE DO NOT OPPOSE PETITIONER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE GUILTY PLEA, ENTER A NOT GUILTYPLEA AND SET ASIDE THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE OF JULY 30,1985/MO GRTD/X:PLEA DATE:07-02-1985/X: SENTENCE DATE:07-30-1985/ /X: THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT WAS NOT PROPERLY ADVISED OF THE POTENTIAL CONSEQUENCES OF A GUILTY PLEA, /CTORD: THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE WERE ILLEGAL AND INVALID,  PREJUDICIAL ERROR DAMAGED THE DEFENDANT,  ACCORDINGLY, THE GUILTY PLEA ENTERED ON07-02-1985 IS SET ASIDE A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED, THE SENTENCE ENTEREDON 07-30-1985 ARE HEREBY VACATED, /X: THERE BEING NO NEW PLEA ENTERED, THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER DISMISSED/MO PC 1385: INTEREST OF JUSTICE/X: ORDER SIGNED AND FILED/
COURT VACATES SENTENCE AS TO IMPACTED CHARGES AND DISMISSES AND SEALSTHE CHARGES PURSUANT 11361,8(F)HS
